title: The No-Nonsense Guide to Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text:
Imagine being a digital creator in Nigeria, struggling to sell ebooks despite having a huge following, because PayPal has blocked your account again. You're not alone. Many creators in restricted countries face the same problem. But what if you could build a digital store that accepts crypto payments, without relying on PayPal or any other blocked payment processor? In this guide, we'll show you how to set up a crypto digital store using Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, and make your first sale without any hassle."
  
  "sections": [
    { "heading": "Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The Core Shop Engine is the backend foundation of your digital store. It handles three critical functions: payment verification, automated delivery, and receipt generation. When you deploy it, you configure it with your NOWPayments API credentials, your wallet addresses for each coin you accept, and the products you are selling with their corresponding file paths and delivery settings. From that point, the engine operates autonomously — it receives payment webhooks from NOWPayments, verifies each transaction on-chain, and triggers the delivery sequence without any manual intervention. The setup process is documented step by step in the included deployment guide. Most creators have it running within two to three hours of starting the installation.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you start, you'll need to sign up for Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, which costs $29.99. You'll also need to set up a NOWPayments account, which is a free service that allows you to accept cryptocurrency payments without any KYC requirements. You'll also need to host your store on a platform like GitHub Pages, which is free and easy to set up.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Once you have your Admin Dashboard and NOWPayments account set up, you'll need to configure your payment and delivery pipeline. This involves linking your NOWPayments account to your Admin Dashboard, and setting up a default payment method for your store. You'll also need to set up automated delivery for your products, so that customers can download them immediately after payment is made.
Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard gives you transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics to help you monitor your store's performance.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

With your payment and delivery pipeline set up, you're ready to go live and start selling. You'll need to add your products to your store, and configure your pricing and payment options. Once you've done that, you can start promoting your store and products to potential customers. When someone makes a purchase, the Admin Dashboard will automatically process the payment and deliver the product to the customer.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Testing your store before promoting it is not optional — it is the step that prevents you from discovering problems after real buyers encounter them. The testing sequence has four steps. First, deploy the Core Shop Engine and verify the webhook endpoint is reachable. Second, configure Web3 Wallet Connect and confirm the checkout interface displays correctly on both desktop and mobile. Third, complete a real mainnet transaction with a small amount — send actual crypto to your wallet address and confirm that the webhook fires, the engine processes it, and the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Fourth, check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log with the correct details. Only after all four steps confirm correctly should you promote your store.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments? To build a digital store that accepts crypto payments, you'll need to sign up for Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard, set up a NOWPayments account, and host your store on a platform like GitHub Pages. This will allow you to accept payments from over 300 coins, without relying on any single payment processor."
